items.titleOriginal: Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG), Search, and Vector Databases
items.titleZh: 检索增强生成 (RAG)、搜索和矢量数据库
items.summary:
如何让你的LLM说实话？使用检索增强生成 (RAG)。在此视频中了解有关 RAG、搜索和矢量数据库的所有信息！

它补充了与 @meilisearch 合作撰写的一系列帖子 
https://www.meilisearch.com/blog/retrieve-and-gain
https://www.meilisearch.com/blog/rag-with-meilisearch
https://www.meilisearch.com/blog/mastering-rag

在这里查看美丽搜索平台！
https://www.meilisearch.com/
items.summaryOriginal:
How do you get your LLM to speak factually? Using Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG).Learn all about RAG, search, and vector databases in this video!

It complements a series of posts written in collaboration with @meilisearch 
https://www.meilisearch.com/blog/retrieve-and-gain
https://www.meilisearch.com/blog/rag-with-meilisearch
https://www.meilisearch.com/blog/mastering-rag

Check out the Meilisearch platform here!
https://www.meilisearch.com/

items.title: Serrano.Academy · YouTube监控
items.titleOriginal: Will AI help us, or make us dependent? - A Tale of Two Cities
items.titleZh: 人工智能会帮助我们，还是让我们产生依赖？ - 两个城市的故事
items.summary: 人工智能会帮助我们还是取代我们？这是一个集体的选择。以下是我对人工智能和社会的看法。
items.summaryOriginal: Will AI help us or replace us? That is a collective choice. Here are my thoughts on AI and society.
items.summaryZh: 人工智能会帮助我们还是取代我们？这是一个集体的选择。以下是我对人工智能和社会的看法。
items.action: 值得观看的AI视频，建议收藏并提取关键信息。

items.title: Serrano.Academy · YouTube监控
items.titleOriginal: After AI, what's next for humans? - The pyramid of human evolution
items.titleZh: 人工智能之后，人类的下一步是什么？ - 人类进化金字塔
items.summary: 人们担心人工智能会让人类变得过时。但我相信事实并非如此。一旦计算机能够帮助我们进行理性思考，我们就有机会提高计算机所不具备的更高技能。这就是我所说的“人类进化金字塔”。
items.summaryOriginal: There's a fear that AI will render humans obsolete. But I believe this is not the case. Once computers can help us with rational thinking, this gives us the chance to enhance much higher skills that computers don't have. This is what I call 'The pyramid of human evolution'.
items.summaryZh: 人们担心人工智能会让人类变得过时。但我相信事实并非如此。一旦计算机能够帮助我们进行理性思考，我们就有机会提高计算机所不具备的更高技能。这就是我所说的“人类进化金字塔”。
items.action: 值得观看的AI视频，建议收藏并提取关键信息。

items.title: Serrano.Academy · YouTube监控
items.summary:
这是有关人工智能代理的两个视频系列中的第二个。
在本视频中，我们学习了代理的架构、代理循环、内存、工具、规划等等！包括如何从静态（自动化）到动态（自主）。

第一个视频 - 法学硕士的优点和缺点：https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gGWufx8DTAo

代码实验室：
RAG 维基百科代理
https://colab.research.google.com/github/luisguiserrano/llm-agentic-workshop/blob/main/LAB_1_RAG_Wikipedia.ipynb

计算器代理
https://colab.research.google.com/github/luisguiserrano/llm-agentic-workshop/blob/main/LAB_2_Calculator_App.ipynb

数学或事实代理
https://colab.research.google.com/github/luisguiserrano/llm-agent...
items.summaryOriginal:
This is the second of a series of two videos on AI Agents.
In this video, we learn the architecture of agents, the agentic loop, memory, tools, planning, and much more! Including how to go from the static (automation) to the dynamic (autonomy).

First video - Strengths and Weaknesses of LLMs: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gGWufx8DTAo

Code labs:
RAG Wikipedia Agent
https://colab.research.google.com/github/luisguiserrano/llm-agentic-workshop/blob/main/LAB_1_RAG_Wikipedia.ipynb

Calculator Agent
https://colab.research.google.com/github/luisguiserrano/llm-agentic-workshop/blob/main/LAB_2_Calculator_App.ipynb

Math or Fact Agent
https://colab.research.google.com/github/luisguiserrano/llm-agent...
